title: Feature suggestion : Rename a file

posts.author: Christophe1 (Audureau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi dear Monday community !

Can we hope to have the possibility to change the name of a file that has already been uploaded ?

For the ones of us managins hundreds of files, that would be an important improvement !

May all of you have a lovely day,

posts.author: HopeM (Hope McCorkle)
posts.cookedHtml: You will find that Monday.com was supposed to be working on it here: Renaming Files Within Monday

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I would absolutely love to be able to rename files within the platform. We try to keep our file names consistent so that we know what they are and it would be so much more convenient to be able to upload files quickly with whatever name they already have and then edit the name afterward.

I understand you are doing a lot on file management in Q2, I am hoping this feature is part of it?

Thank you!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TaylorTedesco - I believe that the new and improved Files management capabilities will let you do this along with file versioning when it comes out later this year!

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s awesome news, thank you!!

posts.author: Fleur (Fleur Dyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is the feature to rename files within Monday now available ?

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow I can’t believe it has already been 8 months since I asked that question. I’ve still not seen a way to do it

posts.author: PlatArtistic (Eva Campos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I can’t see this feature on Monday yet… so I guess, this is still not possible, right?

posts.author: Bill_In_Ohio (Bill Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: Welcome! I’m fairly new to monday.com as well, but I would like to see if this is possible too. And while not completely on topic - but to have a listing of boards/views that can be called with a re-direct so that users weren’t typing in m0nday.com, but could go to m0nday.com or m0nday.com

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s not I was so hopeful too lol.

posts.author: EthanPenn (Ethan Dale)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s the classic Monday.com forums method. They always promise thousands of features, but they never actually get added. They just increase the price.

posts.author: HopeM (Hope McCorkle)
posts.cookedHtml:
February 2023 -

We have users who upload files, and those users give their files names that are vary greatly. If the Monday.com platform could rename uploaded files to a standard naming convention, that would be excellent. Are plans in place for this capability?

posts.author: adowell (A. Dowell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to have the ability to rename files after they’ve been saved to Monday. This would help us be able to organize more easily and keep all files clear and consistent.

posts.author: Justyna (Justyna )
posts.cookedHtml:
Polished Geek | Platinum Partner:

I believe that the new and improved Files management capabilities will let you do this along with file versioning when it comes out later this year!

yes please add it to Monday, we are also waiting for that feature!

posts.author: AutumnImbro11 (Autumn Imbro)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be a game changer for our workflow! Monday - Please consider this feature request. Thank you!

posts.author: aza.rose (Aza Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Replying to bump this (if that’s how this works)

This would be a fantastic thing especially for those of us who are dragging files from emails right into the files column. We do a lot of this on our HR team and to be able to change the name of the file once it’s in monday.com would be an absolute GAME CHANGER

posts.author: HopeM (Hope McCorkle)
posts.cookedHtml: We have not yet found a solution. It seems there is no Monday.com support for this.

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes - this would be so helpful! Please add this feature.

posts.author: meti_integration (Jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hope this one has not been pushed aside!

We use Monday for purchase requests and inventory tracking. i would save hours in our week if would could rename files in monday rather than having to download and reupload

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! This would be very helpful.

posts.author: Kristinemd132 (Kristine)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are 5 more votes on a related Feature Request:

Edit file names and links in files column

This capability would be super helpful!
